notable_excerpts: Adani Solar, which is part of Adani New Industries, was recognized as world's top 10 solar manufacturers.
The Wind division has started shipping the 3.3 MW wind turbine.
6 GW cell and module capacity, which is going to be completed by June.
Adani Airport commissioned Navi Mumbai Airport and also the integrated new terminal at Guwahati.
The Road business completed 2 more HAM projects and takes operational road projects to 9.
Passenger traffic tracks at about 71 million passengers.
Adani Airports acquired 100% stake in AGHPort Aviation Services.
The Airport now contribute about 23% to India's passenger traffic and roughly 29% of the air cargo volumes.
On capital management, positioning AEL's balance sheet for the next phase of growth, we completed the rights issue raising INR24,930 crores.

chain_of_thought: The environmental disclosures are strong, focusing on renewable energy advancements and capacity expansions. Social aspects highlight infrastructure development and community impact through airport and road projects. Governance mentions are moderate, focusing on financial transparency and strategic acquisitions, but lack depth in areas like board independence and ethics.
